description: Educational content, bedtime stories, nursery rhymes, and learning videos for children 2-8

narrator.name: Luna
narrator.voice_style: soft, warm, clear, slightly playful, child-friendly

visual_style.art_style: beautiful flat 2D illustration, bold friendly outlines, vibrant pastel colors, Pixar-inspired warmth, child-friendly characters, storybook quality
visual_style.color_palette: soft yellow, sky blue, mint green, coral pink, lavender, cream white
visual_style.quality_tags: storybook illustration, warm, inviting, child-friendly, beautiful, safe
visual_style.negative_prompt: realistic, dark, scary, violent, adult content, disturbing, photorealistic, text

backgrounds.enchanted_meadow: magical sunny meadow, oversized friendly flowers, butterflies, cartoon style, warm
backgrounds.starry_bedroom: cozy child's bedroom, nightlight, stuffed animals, stars through window, safe
backgrounds.fairy_forest: friendly enchanted forest, glowing mushrooms, friendly woodland creatures, colorful
backgrounds.cloud_castle: fluffy cloud castle in blue sky, rainbow, friendly and magical, storybook

content_pillars: The little cloud who learned to make rain
Why do stars twinkle - bedtime story

llm_system_prompt: You are a children's content creator writing for YouTube Kids. Create safe, educational, and delightful content for ages 2-8. Use simple vocabulary, repetition for learning, and positive messages. All content must be completely safe for young children - no scary elements, no conflict beyond gentle challenges, always positive endings. Made for Kids compliant.
music_style: gentle xylophone, ukulele, glockenspiel, playful and bright, G-major, simple memorable melody, children's music
